## NOTICE245 Supreme Court of Canada Decision - United Parcel Service Canada Ltd. v. Her Majesty the Queen [2009]

## Notice to the reader
The GST/HST rates referenced in this publication are those that were in effect at the time of publishing. For the list of all applicable GST/HST rates (current and historic), go to GST/HST calculator (and rates) .
You can view this publication in:
- HTML notice245-e.html
Last update: 2009-09-30
While all Canada Revenue Agency web content is accessible, we also provide our forms and publications in alternate formats (digital audio, electronic text, Braille, and large print) to allow persons with disabilities to access the information they need.
